privileged_info_summary: Pacific Gas and Electric Company (PG&E) is a real California-based utility that provides both electric and natural gas service to northern and central California. The correct customer service phone number is 1-800-743-5000 and the 24-hour power outage information line is 1-800-743-5002. PG&E's former headquarters was at 77 Beale Street, San Francisco, but the company relocated to 300 Lakeside Drive, Oakland, CA 94612 with the move beginning in 2022. The contact person 'Maria Gonzalez, Emergency Coordination Manager' and the reference to Jefferson County service could not be verified through public sources. There is no Jefferson County in California, suggesting the notes in the task are synthetic/test data.
